headline: NVIDIA China H200 Return Reshapes AI Revenue And Regulatory Risk Profile
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has resumed H200 AI chip sales to China after securing regulatory approval from both U.S. and Chinese authorities. The company is restarting production and has received purchase orders, reopening a revenue stream that had been heavily constrained for nearly a year. The decision comes as export controls, new tariffs, and rising local competition continue to shape access to advanced AI hardware in China. NVIDIA sits at the center of the global AI hardware supply chain,...

The decision comes as export controls, new tariffs, and rising local competition continue to shape access to advanced AI hardware in China.
